title: Parse citations from text and match them to tool calls
purpose: Extract citation references from text and map them to corresponding tool calls, returning segments that are either plain text or citation references.
module_context: Exports types ToolCallRef and CitationSegment, and the parseCitations function that processes text to identify and resolve citation references.

steps.content: If the input text is empty, return an empty array of segments.
Initialize an empty array to collect the parsed segments and a regex to match citation patterns.
Iterate through all matches of the citation pattern in the text.
For each match, extract the citation kind and index, and determine the corresponding tool call.
If a matching tool call is found, add a citation segment with tool details.
If no matching tool call is found, add a text segment with the original citation text.
Add any preceding text before the citation as a text segment.
Add any trailing text after the final citation as a text segment.
Return the complete array of parsed segments.
